build.buildCommand: if [ -f agent/pyproject.toml ]; then cd agent; fi; curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" venv --python 3.13 .venv && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" pip install --python .venv/bin/python torch torchvision --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" pip install --python .venv/bin/python "vision-agents[elevenlabs,getstream,openai,ultralytics]==0.3.7" python-dotenv

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f agent/agent_yolo.py ]; then cd agent; fi; .venv/bin/python agent_yolo.py serve --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
